name: Verne Table Lamp - 24 Inch Height - TBL4497 - Black - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the elegant Verne 24 inch black table lamp, a stylish addition to any decor. Crafted from a blend of resin and iron, this lamp offers a sleek and modern aesthetic that complements a variety of interiors. The striking black finish adds a touch of sophistication, making it a versatile piece for living rooms, bedrooms, or offices. Its 24-inch height provides ample lighting while maintaining a minimal footprint, perfect for desks and side tables. The sturdy construction ensures stability, and its timeless design allows it to seamlessly integrate into both contemporary and traditional settings. Elevate your home with this chic lighting solution.
